summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mock Testing Suite v2.5.0. All specified features working correctly including version display, home page layout, ticker content, Discord popup tabs, Help page tabs, Support functionality, navigation, and Calls scenario card.
passed_tests: Backend APIs - All 7 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Version v2.5.0 displayed correctly in sidebar and status bar
Home page fits without scrolling at 1280x800 - all 3 buttons and stats visible
Ticker bar shows live content from Google Doc (not default messages)
Discord Post popup has Templates and Screenshots tabs
Discord Screenshots tab shows Copy Image button
Help page has all 5 tabs with correct data-testids
Help Support tab has Send Email (blyshawnp@gmail.com) and Discord (shawnbly) buttons
All pages navigate correctly between Home, Basics, Calls, Settings, Help
Calls Scenario card shows Thank You Gift info and bullet-formatted variables
